title: Every OH subscription includes entity formation, registered address in Zug, and ongoing financial and contributor operations.
content:
**Setup Services (one-time):**
- Swiss Association formation with licensed local counsel
- Registered address in Zug
- VAT documentation
- Contract templates

**Recurring Services:**
- Annual tax filing
- Monthly accounting & close
- Monthly expense reports
- Invoice management
- Reimbursement management
- Expense policies (role-based)
- Contributor onboarding & operations
- Multi-currency payouts
- Dedicated ops support

**Advanced tier adds:**
- Multiple entities
- Dedicated account manager
- Admin portal
- Custom workflows & reporting
- Add-ons: exchange setup, banking, AML monitoring

The setup process: initial consultation → KYB/KYC verification → founding meeting with licensed Swiss counsel → entity registration → ongoing operational services begin immediately.

Facet categories: SNO Function (Operational Hub for Open Source Builders), Legal Entity (Swiss Association, BVI Entity), Anonymity (High/Highest), Team (Remote/Local).
description: Setup: Swiss Association formation, Zug address, VAT docs, templates. Ongoing: accounting, invoicing, payouts, contributor onboarding, expense mgmt.
